description: Clean and augment the rebate tracking spreadsheet by standardizing date and status formats, calculating deadline metrics including days remaining, and generating financial totals. Classify entries by priority, apply urgency-based conditional formatting, and sort the final data. Save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/rebate_tracking_final.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a messy spreadsheet tracking mail-in rebates. Clean the date formats, calculate missing deadlines and days remaining, standardize the status field, add priority classification based on urgency, apply conditional formatting to highlight urgent rebates, calculate financial totals for pending and at-risk amounts, and sort the data by priority.
